title: --preserve-digests flag not working in skopeo copy command
body:
/aditya-poc/acc/images# skopeo copy --all --preserve-digest tarball:enterprise-helm-repo-493-integration.tar docker://docker.repo.eng.netapp.com/amokkara/dummy/helm-repo:493-integration

**FATA[0000] unknown flag: --preserve-digest**


is this flag not supported any more?

~/aditya-poc/acc/images# skopeo --version
skopeo version 1.5.0

ubuntu 20.04

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

The flag was introduced in v1.9.0; 1.5.0 is too old.
Thanks, it worked. closing the issue.
